title: Craftable Wither Skulls
description: This datapack allows you to craft Wither Skeleton Skulls when Wither Skeletons are not available on your server. A simple way to keep the Wither fight accessible without needing natural spawns.
body:
# Wither Skeleton Skull Crafting

**Version:** 1.0  
**Minecraft Version:** 1.21.1+
**Author:** Antre des loutres 

---

## Description
This datapack allows players to **craft Wither Skeleton Skulls** in survival mode. Normally, Wither Skeleton Skulls are extremely rare and can only be obtained by killing Wither Skeletons, but with this datapack, you can craft them directly using specific materials.  
Perfect for servers where Wither Skeletons do not spawn or are difficult to farm.

---

## Features
- Craft Wither Skeleton Skulls using **various ingredients**.  
- Makes the Wither boss fight accessible even without natural spawns.  
- Fully compatible with vanilla Minecraft gameplay.  
- Easy to install and remove.

---

## Installation
1. Download the datapack `.jar`.  
2. Place the fils in your world’s `datapacks` or `mods` directory:
